name: Maple Pecan Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crust according to package directions for one crust pie. Refrigerate remaining pie crust for later use.
2. Heat oven to 425 degrees.
3. Place prepared crust in a 10-inch tart pan with removable bottom or a 9-inch pie pan. Press into the bottom and up sides of the pan. Trim edges if necessary.
4. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; blend well. Carefully pour into pie crust-lined pan.
5. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool.
6. In a small bowl, beat cream until soft peaks form. Blend in powdered sugar and maple flavor; beat until stiff peaks form.
7. Spoon or pipe over filling. Garnish with pecan halves.
8. Store in refrigerator.
